risk_factors: foreign currency exchange rates, interest rates and commodity prices
hedging_purpose: manage risks associated with foreign exchange rate and interest rate fluctuations
governance_structure: Senior management oversees risk management and derivative activities, sets financial risk policies and objectives, and provides guidelines for derivative instrument utilization. Senior management also establishes procedures related to control and valuation, risk analysis, counterparty credit approval, and ongoing monitoring and reporting
sensitivity_analysis: The Company performs a sensitivity analysis based on hypothetical changes in foreign currency spot exchange rates and interest rates
excluded_items: cash equivalents, accounts receivable, accounts payable, available-for-sale marketable securities
cross_references: Note 1. Significant Accounting Policies, Note 11. Marketable Securities, Note 12. Long-Term Debt and Short-Term Borrowings, Note 15. Derivatives and Note 16. Fair Value Measurements
